features.title: Why AI Educademy?
features.subtitle: Start from zero. No prerequisites needed - we guide you every step.

beginner.title: Start from Zero
beginner.description: Never touched code? Good. We use everyday language and real-world examples, how Netflix recommends films, how your phone recognises your face.

interactive.title: Learn by Doing
interactive.description: Hands-on experiments in your browser. Train an AI to recognise drawings, teach a chatbot, see results instantly.

multilingual.title: In Your Language

practical.title: Real-World AI

features.structuredDesc: Carefully sequenced tracks from beginner to expert
features.lessonsDesc: Deep, well-researched content across every topic
features.languagesDesc: Learn in English, French, Dutch, Hindi, or Telugu
features.programsDesc: Three tracks covering learning, building, and career prep
features.labDesc: Hands-on experiments to solidify your understanding
features.openSourceDesc: Fully transparent - view, fork, or contribute

founder.description: Conceived, designed, and built every part of AI Educademy from scratch: the architecture, curriculum, multilingual infrastructure, and open-source tooling. Over fifteen years engineering large-scale systems at JP Morgan, Sky, and Marks & Spencer across Asia and Europe. That global experience made one thing clear: language should never be a barrier to learning.

about.title: About AI Educademy
about.missionText: AI education for every student, regardless of language, background, or experience.
about.storyText1: I'm Ramesh Reddy Adutla, the founder, designer, and sole engineer behind AI Educademy. With 15 years building large-scale distributed systems at JP Morgan, Sky, and Marks & Spencer across Asia and Europe, I've spent my career at the intersection of technology and real-world impact.
about.storyText2: AI will reshape every industry. Yet the best AI education remains locked behind expensive institutions in a handful of countries. That gap isn't just unfair, it's a massive waste of potential.
about.storyText3: I conceived AI Educademy and built it entirely from scratch: the architecture, curriculum, multilingual infrastructure, open-source tooling, every line of code. What started as evenings and weekends became a fully-fledged platform serving learners in 11 languages across 6 continents.
about.storyText4: Working across multiple countries where English isn't the first language made one thing clear: language should never be a barrier to learning. I speak English, French, and Telugu, so building a multilingual platform felt like the obvious move.

value1.title: Accessible
value1.description: If you can open a web browser, you can learn AI. No special software, no powerful computer needed.

value2.title: Inclusive
value2.description: Education in your language, with examples from your culture. AI isn't just a Silicon Valley thing.

value3.title: Honest
value3.description: We teach what AI can do AND what it can't. No hype, no fear, just understanding.

value4.title: Open
value4.description: Every lesson, every line of code is open source. Fork it, translate it, improve it.

about.subtitle: Founder & Creator · Engineering Leader · Open Source Contributor
about.timeline2011: Started career in software engineering in India 🇮🇳
about.timeline2014: Moved to Belgium, built fintech systems, learned French 🇧🇪
about.timeline2017: JP Morgan, trading platforms and high-performance systems ��
about.timeline2019: Sky, streaming platform serving millions of users 📺
about.timeline2021: Cloud-native microservices and data pipelines at scale 🛒
about.timeline2024: Open-source contributions, Apache Gravitino, GOV.UK, Spring Boot MCP 🌐
about.timeline2025: Founded AI Educademy. AI education for everyone 🎓
about.pageDescription: AI Educademy is an open-source AI education platform built for everyone. Learn about our mission to make AI education accessible worldwide.
about.pageSubtitle: Open-source AI education for every student.
about.openSourceDesc: Every lesson, every line of code. Open source. Fork it, translate it, make it yours.

lessons.title: Lessons
lessons.subtitle: Every lesson builds on the last. No rush, no assumptions.
lessons.suggestEdit: Suggest an edit to this lesson
lessons.trackCompleteDesc: You have finished every lesson in
lessons.quizIncorrect: Not quite - but that is how we learn!

programs.title: Choose Your Learning Path
programs.subtitle: Pick the level that matches where you are.
programs.pageDescription: Explore our AI learning tracks and software engineering academics. From absolute beginner to advanced, learn at your own pace in 5 languages.

ai-learning.title: AI Foundations
ai-learning.desc: From curious beginner to confident AI practitioner
ai-learning.brand: Understand how machines think, learn, and create - from your first "what is AI?" to building production systems.

craft-engineering.title: AI Mastery
craft-engineering.desc: Master data structures, system design, and engineering for the AI era
craft-engineering.brand: Learn the algorithms that power AI, design the systems that scale AI, and ace the interviews that land you AI-era jobs.

career-ready.title: Career Ready
career-ready.desc: From blank-page nerves to signed offer letter
career-ready.tagline: Launchpad → Behavioral → Technical → ML Interview → Offer
career-ready.brand: Master every stage of the tech interview process, from preparation and behaviorals to system design and offer negotiation.
career-ready.description: From blank-page nerves to signed offer. Your complete interview preparation journey

ai-seeds.title: AI Seeds
ai-seeds.subtitle: Plant Your First AI Knowledge
ai-seeds.description: Start from absolute zero. We use plain language and everyday examples to build your understanding, step by step.
ai-seeds.audience: Complete beginners with no technical background
outcomes: Understand what AI is and isn't
Know how machines learn from data
Train a simple AI model in your browser

ai-sprouts.title: AI Sprouts
ai-sprouts.subtitle: Build Your AI Foundations
ai-sprouts.description: Ready to grow? Dive into the building blocks of AI - data, algorithms, and neural networks. Hands-on exercises help you build intuition before writing code.
ai-sprouts.audience: Learners who completed AI Seeds or have basic AI awareness
outcomes: Distinguish supervised, unsupervised, and reinforcement learning
Understand what training data is and why it matters
Think critically about AI bias and fairness

ai-branches.title: AI Branches
ai-branches.subtitle: Explore Real-World Applications
ai-branches.description: See AI in action across industries - healthcare, finance, creative arts, and more. Start building simple projects and understand the tools professionals use.
ai-branches.audience: Learners ready to see AI applied in practice

ai-canopy.title: AI Canopy
ai-canopy.subtitle: Deep Dive into AI Systems
ai-canopy.description: Go deeper into neural networks, large language models, and AI system design. Learn to evaluate AI tools critically and understand the engineering behind modern AI.
ai-canopy.audience: Intermediate learners ready for technical depth
outcomes: Evaluate AI tools and services critically

ai-forest.title: AI Forest
ai-forest.subtitle: Master the AI Ecosystem
ai-forest.description: The complete picture - AI research, building production AI systems, contributing to open-source AI, and understanding where the field is heading. For those who want to shape the future.
ai-forest.audience: Advanced learners and aspiring AI practitioners
outcomes: Build and deploy an AI-powered application
Read and understand AI research papers

ai-sketch.title: AI Sketch
ai-sketch.subtitle: Rough Outlines - DSA Fundamentals
ai-sketch.description: Master the fundamental data structures and algorithms that power AI systems. Arrays, hash maps, strings, and sorting - visualised with diagrams, explained with AI real-world applications.
ai-sketch.audience: Engineers starting interview prep or refreshing fundamentals
outcomes: Solve array and hash map problems confidently
Understand how these patterns power AI systems

ai-chisel.title: AI Chisel
ai-chisel.subtitle: Carving Precision - Intermediate Patterns
ai-chisel.description: Level up with intermediate algorithmic patterns: two pointers, sliding window, BFS/DFS, and tree traversals. Each pattern tied to real AI/ML applications.
ai-chisel.audience: Engineers with DSA basics ready for medium-level problems
outcomes: Apply two pointers and sliding window to optimise solutions
Traverse trees and graphs with BFS/DFS
Connect these patterns to AI search and inference

ai-craft.title: AI Craft
ai-craft.subtitle: Building Skill - System Design
ai-craft.description: Design large-scale systems that power AI: recommendation engines, search autocomplete, rate limiters. Learn to think in architectures, not just code.
ai-craft.audience: Mid-to-senior engineers preparing for system design rounds

ai-polish.title: AI Polish
ai-polish.subtitle: Refining Excellence - Behavioral Mastery
ai-polish.description: Master the behavioral interview with structured frameworks. STAR method, leadership principles, AI-era scenarios, and communication strategies.
ai-polish.audience: Engineers at any level preparing for behavioral rounds
ai-polish.prerequisites: Real project experience to draw from
outcomes: Navigate AI ethics and leadership questions

ai-masterpiece.title: AI Masterpiece
ai-masterpiece.subtitle: Portfolio-Ready - End-to-End Case Studies
ai-masterpiece.description: Capstone projects combining DSA, system design, and behavioral skills. Design real systems end-to-end and build your engineering portfolio.
ai-masterpiece.prerequisites: Completed AI Sketch through AI Polish

ai-launchpad.title: Interview Launchpad
ai-launchpad.subtitle: Your Interview Journey Begins
ai-launchpad.description: Master the fundamentals of technical interview preparation. Learn how to research companies, decode job descriptions, build your preparation timeline, and develop the mindset that turns nervousness into confidence.
ai-launchpad.audience: Anyone starting their tech interview preparation journey
ai-launchpad.prerequisites: None. This is your starting point.
outcomes: Build a structured interview preparation plan

ai-behavioral.title: Behavioral Mastery
ai-behavioral.subtitle: Stories That Land Offers
ai-behavioral.description: Master behavioral interviews with the STAR framework, leadership narratives, and structured storytelling. Learn to transform your experience into compelling answers that prove your value.
ai-behavioral.audience: Engineers at any level preparing for behavioral rounds
ai-behavioral.prerequisites: Real project experience to draw from

ai-technical.title: Technical Interviews
ai-technical.subtitle: Code Under Pressure
ai-technical.description: Conquer coding interviews, system design rounds, and technical deep dives. From data structures to distributed systems, build the skills and confidence to excel under pressure.
ai-technical.audience: Software engineers preparing for technical interview rounds
ai-technical.prerequisites: Solid programming fundamentals in at least one language
outcomes: Design scalable systems on a whiteboard

ai-ml-interview.title: AI & ML Interviews
ai-ml-interview.subtitle: The Machine Learning Interview
ai-ml-interview.description: Specialised preparation for AI and machine learning roles. Cover ML system design, model evaluation, MLOps, and the unique interview formats used by AI-focused companies.
ai-ml-interview.audience: Engineers targeting AI/ML roles at tech companies

ai-offer.title: Offer & Beyond
ai-offer.subtitle: From Offer to Career Growth
ai-offer.description: Navigate the final stretch: salary negotiation, offer evaluation, and career growth strategies. Learn to benchmark compensation, negotiate effectively, and plan your long-term career trajectory.
ai-offer.audience: Engineers who have received or expect job offers
ai-offer.prerequisites: Active interview process or recent offer

neuralSection.explanation: Adjust the input sliders and click Forward Pass to watch data propagate through the network. Blue connections are positive weights, red are negative. Thicker lines mean stronger connections.

tokenizerSection.title: AI Tokeniser
tokenizerSection.description: See how LLMs break text into tokens, the fundamental units AI processes.
tokenizerSection.placeholder: Type text to see how AI breaks it into tokens...
tokenizerSection.explanation: AI doesn't read text like humans. It breaks text into tokens, subword pieces processed individually. Longer words get split into smaller chunks.

playground.promptPlaceholder: Type your prompt here... (Ctrl+Enter to submit)
playground.feedbackExcellent: 🎯 Excellent prompt! Clear, specific, and well-structured.
playground.feedbackGood: 👍 Good attempt! Try being more specific about the format and constraints.
playground.feedbackGettingThere: 📝 Getting there - include more relevant keywords and be explicit about what you want.
playground.feedbackVague: 🔄 Too vague. Try specifying the task, format, and any constraints explicitly.
playground.vagueResponse: I'm not sure what you're looking for. Could you be more specific about what you need?
playground.placeBet: // Place your bet - which algorithm wins?
playground.mergeWins: Merge Sort wins with O(n log n) guaranteed performance!
playground.quickWins: Quick Sort is the fastest on average - O(n log n) with low overhead!
playground.bubbleWins: Bubble Sort won?! That's extremely rare with random data - usually O(n²)!
playground.helpText: Dbl-click rename · Del remove · ⌘Z undo · ⌘+/- zoom · ⌘0 reset · Middle-click pan

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about AI Educademy, from getting started to going deep.
faq.a1: AI Educademy is an open-source platform for learning Artificial Intelligence. We offer structured programs, interactive lessons, and hands-on lab experiments to help anyone, regardless of background, understand and apply AI concepts.
faq.q2: How does AI Educademy pricing work?
faq.a2: AI Educademy offers a generous free tier: beginner programs, first lessons of every course, blog posts, and lab experiments are all free. When you're ready to go deeper, our Pro plan unlocks every program, track, certificate, and premium feature at an affordable price.
faq.a3: AI Educademy was built with the mission of making AI education accessible to everyone, everywhere. The project is open-source and community-driven, welcoming contributions from developers, educators, and learners worldwide.
faq.a4: We offer two learning paths: the AI Learning Path (including AI Seeds for absolute beginners, AI Foundations, and more advanced programs) and the Craft Engineering Path for those interested in building AI-powered software. Each path has multiple programs with dozens of structured lessons.
faq.q5: How long does it take to complete a program?
faq.a5: It depends on the program and your pace. Beginner programs like AI Seeds can be completed in a few hours of focused study. More advanced programs may take several weeks. There are no deadlines. You learn entirely at your own pace.
faq.q6: What skill level do I need to start?
faq.a6: No prior experience is needed for beginner programs. AI Seeds and other introductory programs start from absolute zero: no math, no coding, no technical background required. Just curiosity.
faq.q7: Do I need to know how to code?
faq.a7: Not to start! Our introductory programs require zero coding knowledge. As you progress through the paths, you'll be gently introduced to relevant concepts and tools, but the emphasis is always on understanding AI deeply, not memorising syntax.
faq.a8: For beginner programs: none at all. For intermediate and advanced programs, it helps to have completed earlier programs in the path, but it's not strictly required. Jump in wherever feels right for you.
faq.q9: What languages is the content available in?
faq.a9: AI Educademy is available in 9 languages: English, French, Dutch, Hindi, Telugu, Spanish, Portuguese, German, and Chinese. All content is thoughtfully translated, not machine-generated, so the experience feels natural in your language.
faq.a10: Yes! Use the language switcher in the navigation bar to change the platform language at any time. Your learning progress is stored per language, so you can study in multiple languages simultaneously if you want.
faq.a11: Yes, fully open source. The entire codebase is publicly available on GitHub under an open licence. You can inspect the code, suggest improvements, fork it, or build on top of it.
faq.q12: How can I contribute to the project?
faq.a12: There are many ways to contribute: submitting code improvements, writing or translating lessons, reporting bugs, improving documentation, or simply starring the repository on GitHub to help others discover the project. Every contribution matters.
faq.q13: Is AI really hard to learn?
faq.a13: It can seem daunting at first, but it absolutely doesn't have to be. Our programs break complex concepts into clear, digestible lessons using real-world examples, analogies, and interactive experiments. Most learners are surprised by how accessible AI becomes with the right guidance.
faq.q14: How long will it take to learn AI?
faq.a14: You can grasp the fundamentals of AI in a few weeks of consistent, focused study. Becoming truly proficient takes longer, but the journey is rewarding at every stage. Our programs are designed to give you practical, applicable knowledge from day one.
faq.a15: The Lab is a collection of interactive AI experiments you can run live in your browser. No installation or setup required. Explore a neural network playground, test AI vs human text detection, experiment with prompts, generate images, analyse sentiment, chat with an AI, and explore ethics scenarios.
faq.q16: Do I need an account to start learning?
faq.a16: No account needed to browse. You can start any beginner lesson or program immediately without signing up. Creating an account (or signing in with Google) lets you track your progress across devices and unlock premium content.
faq.a17: Completion certificates are on our roadmap. Currently, the focus is on building genuine understanding and practical skills. When certificates launch, they'll be available for Pro subscribers who complete programs.
faq.q18: How often is new content added?
faq.a18: New lessons, programs, blog articles, and lab experiments are added regularly. The platform is actively maintained and evolves alongside advances in AI technology, so there's always something new to explore.
faq.q19: What AI topics do the programs cover?
faq.a19: Topics include: what AI and machine learning really are, how neural networks work, natural language processing, computer vision, AI ethics and bias, prompt engineering, large language models, and how to apply AI tools effectively in real-world projects.
faq.q20: What is the Craft Engineering path?
faq.a20: The Craft Engineering path focuses on the software engineering skills needed to build AI-powered applications, covering software design principles, clean architecture, reliability engineering, and how to integrate AI models into production-grade systems.
faq.q21: Can I learn on my phone or tablet?
faq.a21: Absolutely! AI Educademy is fully responsive and works beautifully on mobile devices and tablets. It's also a Progressive Web App (PWA), so you can install it on your home screen for a fast, app-like experience, even with limited connectivity.
faq.q22: Is there a community or forum?
faq.a22: Yes! We have a community section where learners connect, share progress, ask questions, and support each other. You're not learning alone. There are fellow learners at every stage of the journey.
faq.q23: How do I track my learning progress?
faq.a23: Progress is tracked automatically as you complete lessons and programs. Sign in or create a guest profile to access your personalised progress dashboard, see your completion stats, and easily resume where you left off.
faq.q24: What makes AI Educademy different from other platforms?
faq.a24: Four things set us apart: a generous free tier so anyone can start learning, it's fully open source and transparent, it's available in 11 languages with genuine multilingual content, and it's designed from the ground up for true beginners: no jargon, no intimidating prerequisites, no gatekeeping.
faq.a25: Just click 'Start Learning' below (or the 'Get Started' button in the navigation) and choose a program. We recommend starting with AI Seeds if you're new to AI. No registration required to browse. You can begin learning right now, in your language.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.subtitle: Last updated: March 2025
terms.intro: Welcome to AI Educademy. By accessing or using our platform, you agree to be bound by these terms.

use.title: 1. Use of Service
use.content: AI Educademy provides AI education content including courses, interactive labs, and learning resources. You may use our service for personal, non-commercial educational purposes. You must be at least 13 years old to use this service.

accounts.title: 2. User Accounts
accounts.content: You may sign in using Google or GitHub OAuth. You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account. You must provide accurate information during registration. We reserve the right to suspend accounts that violate these terms.

subscriptions.title: 3. Subscriptions & Payments
subscriptions.content: AI Educademy offers free and paid tiers. Paid subscriptions are processed securely through Stripe. Monthly and annual subscriptions renew automatically unless cancelled. You may cancel at any time through your account dashboard. Refunds are handled on a case-by-case basis within 14 days of purchase, in accordance with UK consumer rights.

content.title: 4. Content & Intellectual Property
content.content: All course content, including text, code examples, diagrams, and interactive exercises, is the intellectual property of AI Educademy. Free-tier content is available under the MIT licence where indicated. Premium content may not be redistributed, copied, or shared without permission.

conduct.title: 5. Acceptable Use
conduct.content: You agree not to: share your account credentials, attempt to access premium content without a valid subscription, use automated tools to scrape content, upload malicious content, or harass other users. Violation may result in account termination.

disclaimer.title: 6. Disclaimer
disclaimer.content: AI Educademy provides educational content on an "as is" basis. While we strive for accuracy, we do not guarantee that all content is error-free or up-to-date. AI Educademy is not responsible for career outcomes or interview results.

liability.title: 7. Limitation of Liability
liability.content: To the maximum extent permitted by law, AI Educademy shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of the service. Our total liability shall not exceed the amount you have paid us in the 12 months prior to the claim.

changes.title: 8. Changes to Terms
changes.content: We may update these terms from time to time. Continued use of the service after changes constitutes acceptance. We will notify registered users of significant changes via email.

governing.title: 9. Governing Law
governing.content: These terms are governed by the laws of England and Wales. Any disputes shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of England and Wales.

contact.title: 10. Contact
contact.content: For questions about these terms, contact us at support@aieducademy.org.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: Last updated: March 2025
privacy.intro: AI Educademy is committed to protecting your privacy. This policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your personal information.

collect.title: 1. Information We Collect
collect.content: We collect: your name, email address, and profile image from your OAuth provider (Google or GitHub); your learning progress and course completions; subscription and payment information processed by Stripe; usage data including pages visited and features used; device and browser information for analytics.

use.title: 2. How We Use Your Information
use.content: We use your information to: provide and personalise the learning experience; track your course progress; process payments and manage subscriptions; send important account and service notifications; improve our platform through analytics; send optional educational newsletters (you can opt out at any time).

sharing.title: 3. Information Sharing
sharing.content: We do not sell your personal information. We share data only with: Stripe (payment processing), Resend (email delivery), Neon (database hosting), Vercel (hosting), and GitHub/Google (authentication). All third-party providers are GDPR-compliant.

cookies.title: 4. Cookies & Tracking
cookies.content: We use essential cookies for authentication and session management. We use analytics to understand how our platform is used. We do not use advertising cookies or sell data to advertisers.

retention.title: 5. Data Retention
retention.content: We retain your account data for as long as your account is active. If you delete your account, we will remove your personal data within 30 days. Anonymised analytics data may be retained indefinitely. Payment records are retained as required by UK tax law.

rights.title: 6. Your Rights (GDPR)
rights.content: Under UK GDPR, you have the right to: access your personal data; correct inaccurate data; request deletion of your data; export your data in a portable format; object to processing of your data; withdraw consent at any time. To exercise these rights, contact us at privacy@aieducademy.org.

security.title: 7. Security
security.content: We implement industry-standard security measures including: encrypted data transmission (TLS/SSL), secure authentication via OAuth 2.0, PCI-compliant payment processing through Stripe, regular security reviews, and access controls on all systems.

children.title: 8. Children's Privacy
children.content: AI Educademy is not intended for children under 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13. If you believe a child has provided us with personal data, please contact us immediately.

international.title: 9. International Data Transfers
international.content: Your data may be processed in the EU and US through our hosting providers. All transfers are protected by appropriate safeguards including Standard Contractual Clauses where applicable.

changes.title: 10. Changes to This Policy
changes.content: We may update this policy from time to time. We will notify you of significant changes via email. Continued use of the service after changes constitutes acceptance.

contact.title: 11. Contact Us
contact.content: For privacy-related inquiries: Email privacy@aieducademy.org. Data Protection queries can be directed to theglobalmind.ai@gmail.com.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: Have a question, idea, or just want to say hello? We’d love to hear from you.

ai-seeds.description: Begin your AI journey with beginner-friendly lessons covering core concepts, terminology, and how AI is shaping the world.

ai-sketch.description: Start building AI applications with hands-on projects. Learn to use AI APIs, prompt engineering, and practical coding patterns.

ai-launchpad.description: Kickstart your AI career preparation with interview fundamentals, common question patterns, and confidence-building exercises.

journey.title: Your AI Learning Journey
journey.subtitle: Navigate your personalized path through AI mastery — from foundations to career readiness.
journey.signInPrompt: Sign in to track your progress and unlock your personalized learning journey.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Three simple steps from curious beginner to confident AI builder
howItWorks.step1Desc: Pick from 3 tracks — AI Learning, Craft Engineering, or Career Ready. Each track has curated programs that take you from zero to mastery.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Interactive lessons, hands-on experiments, and real code. No passive video watching — you build understanding through practice.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Apply your skills in our AI Lab with 7 experiments. Build chatbots, classifiers, and AI agents that solve real problems.

labPreview.title: Interactive AI Lab
labPreview.subtitle: Experiment with real AI concepts in your browser. No setup required.
labPreview.promptEngineeringDesc: Master the art of AI prompts

projects.title: What You'll Build
projects.subtitle: Graduate from learning to building. These projects showcase what you'll be capable of.
projects.chatbotDesc: Build a conversational AI that understands context, handles multi-turn dialogue, and responds intelligently.
projects.classifierDesc: Train a computer vision model that recognises and categorises images with high accuracy.
projects.recommenderDesc: Design an ML system that predicts user preferences and delivers personalised suggestions.
projects.agentDesc: Create an autonomous AI that reasons, plans, and executes tasks using tools and APIs.

testimonials.title: Platform Highlights
testimonials.quote: Built by an engineer with 15+ years at JP Morgan, Sky, and global tech companies — designed to make AI education truly accessible to everyone.
